title: Dove Hair Care Complete Reconstruction Anti Breakage Hair Repair Formula Shampoo
description:
Dove Full Reconstruction Shampoo was developed to help to repair damage and prevent breakage caused by daily wear and tear. Our hair can suffer greatly from the daily damage of heat styling products, environmental pollutions, and more. Dove has created Complete Reconstruction Formula Shampoo to visibly repair the damage, strengthen against breakage, and progressively nourish with continued use to help give you hair that feels as good as it looks. For damaged and breakage-prone tresses that stand up to a hairdryer, curling iron, hair color, and hair accessories on the daily, Dove’s complete reconstruction hair care shampoo works to restore the hair and scalp, repairing done damage from hair styling tools, color, bleaching and more

Dove Hair Care Complete Reconstruction Anti Breakage Hair Repair Formula Shampoo

Dove Full Reconstruction Shampoo was developed to help to repair damage and prevent breakage caused by daily wear and tear. Our hair can suffer greatly from the daily damage of heat styling products, environmental pollutions, and more. Dove has created Complete Reconstruction Formula Shampoo to visibly repair the damage, strengthen against breakage, and progressively nourish with continued use to help give you hair that feels as good as it looks.

Key Features

  • RESCUE DRY & DAMAGED HAIR: Dove Complete Reconstruction shampoo formula has been developed for the care of damaged hair prone to breakage and dryness; This hydrating hair care shampoo from Dove works to reconstruct your hair with each and every wash, helping to restore hair while also protecting hair from any further damage
  • PROVIDES INTENSE HAIR REPAIR: For damaged and breakage-prone tresses that stand up to a hair dryer, curling iron, hair color and hair accessories on the daily, Dove’s complete reconstruction hair care shampoo works to restore the hair and scalp, repairing done damage from hair styling tools, color, bleaching and more
  • REDUCE HAIR BREAKAGE: If your hair is prone to breakage, thin or just straight up damaged from over-processing, this is the perfect formula to provide full-strand nourishment; reinforcing your locks from the inside out, it this Dove shampoo formula seals strands from root to tip, leaving it soft, smooth and shiny
  • SAFE FOR EVERYDAY SHAMPOOING: The non-greasy shampoo formula treats deeply damaged hair without leaving leftover residue behind; the complete reconstruction shampooing formula from Dove is safe for regular, daily use and is also safe to use on color-treated hair as well, providing progressive nourishment over time for healthier hair
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Brand: Dove; Weight: .9lbs; Volume: 350mL or 11.83 fluid ounces; Bottle: 100% recycled material

Product Specifications

  • MPN: DOVREC12
  • UPC: 750630315776
  • Color: White
  • Size: Standard Size

For damaged and breakage-prone tresses that stand up to a hairdryer, curling iron, hair color, and hair accessories on the daily, Dove’s complete reconstruction hair care shampoo works to restore the hair and scalp, repairing done damage from hair styling tools, color, bleaching and more.

The non-greasy shampoo formula treats deeply damaged hair without leaving leftover residue behind; the complete reconstruction shampooing formula from Dove is safe for regular, daily use and is also safe to use on color-treated hair as well, providing progressive nourishment over time for healthier hair.

Apply the Dove anti-knot, hydration, and moisturizing shampoo to wet hair, lather, and rinse well.
